summary: W1539 compares the legacy semantic-input adapter with the W1537 typeclass-route stable packages. It converts the W1537 direct-source stable instance facts into MetrizableOrdinaryStableSemanticInput, proves the semantic adapter has ready accepted certificate evidence, and proves on both closed-map and closed-embedding branches that the semantic-adapter package is definitionally the same as the W1537 typeclass package, the W1533 direct package, and the W1534 accepted package. It preserves the 74-input W987 ledger and leaves the final original four-task completion surface nonterminal with productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the original four-task contract.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

W1539 proves that the W1537 stable instance facts erase through the legacy semantic adapter to the same W1537/W1533/W1534 bounded-derived package and projections, but it still depends on the W987 74-input ledger rather than constructing all 74 inputs from independent mathematical data.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; the current route still relies on assumed boundary, relation, target-surjectivity, target-compactness, mapped-cokernel, selected-difference, strict-preimage, normalized-lift, fixed-target uniqueness, source-triangulation, endpoint, localized-unit, unit mapping-cone, selected-cochain, strict-realization, iso-closure, target-isomorphism, target-ExactAt, target-homology-zero, concrete-leaves target-ExactAt, endpoint-localized target-ExactAt, closedness-branch target-ExactAt, target-ExactAt left-calculus, comparison-bijectivity left-calculus, direct-left-calculus, W829 stable-field, W829 stable-certificate, W829 accepted-package, W829 projection-comparison, W829 direct-source stable-instance, W829 typeclass-package comparison, W829 semantic-adapter comparison, and other W987 constructor fields rather than a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1539/W1538/W1537/W1536/W1535/W1534/W1533/W1532/W1531/W1530/W1529/W1528/W1527/W1526/W1525/W1524/W1523/W1522/W1521/W1520/W1519/W1518/W1517/W1516/W1515/W1514/W1513/W1512/W1511/W1510/W1509/W1508/W1507/W1506/W1505/W1504/W1503/W1502/W1501/W1500/W1499/W1498/W1497/W1496/W1495 route inputs and remaining W1494 constructor inputs, or replace the field-ledger route with an explicit positive witness satisfying the positive-witness supplement.
Before any product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
